message:
feat(memory_budget): Cx-first run_with_cx entry point (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds MemoryBudgetManager::run_with_cx behind the asupersync-runtime
feature, mirroring the CpuPressureMonitor::run_with_cx pattern landed
in commit 2ee8a04b. These two sampling loops share the same lifecycle
shape (first-tick skip → sleep(interval) → shutdown check → sample →
log-if-pressure) so their Cx-first variants are structurally identical.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/memory_budget.rs (+108, additions only)

   Adds `MemoryBudgetManager::run_with_cx(cx: &Cx, shutdown)`.

     * Pre-flight cancellation gate. If `cx.is_cancel_requested()` is
       true on entry, returns without sampling.

     * Each inter-sample sleep bound via
       `crate::runtime_compat::sleep_with_cx`, so budget-driven
       cancellation from the outer scope cuts the sleep deterministically
       under LabRuntime virtual time. If the sleep returns Err
       (cancellation), the loop terminates cleanly without a spurious
       extra sample.

     * Both `shutdown` flag and `cx.is_cancel_requested()` checked each
       iteration so either cancellation path terminates the loop at the
       next iteration gate.

   Legacy `run` preserved; strictly additive.

   Two new LabRuntime tests under `labruntime_memory_budget`:

     * `run_with_cx_pre_cancelled_exits_without_sampling` (seed
       0x3E30_10CE_BED5_0101): pre-cancels the Cx; asserts samples
       counter unchanged and shutdown flag untouched.

     * `run_with_cx_shutdown_set_exits_without_sampling` (seed
       0x3E30_10CE_BED5_0202): shutdown flag set before entry; asserts
       zero samples taken (the shutdown check runs before sample_all()
       on the first tick), pinning the shared shutdown/Cx termination
       contract.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib memory_budget::: 54/54 pass
    (52 existing + 2 new LabRuntime)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress — this is the second sampling
monitor to gain a Cx-first run entry point (after CpuPressureMonitor).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
